description: Constitutional metadata for a registered atomic action (src/body/atomic/registry.py). ActionDefinition is the runtime declaration for every AtomicAction; its action_id, category, and impact_level drive the autonomy gate. impact_level is a bare str (not enum) with empty string default — it is overlaid at ActionExecutor init from .intent/enforcement/config/action_risk.yaml (ADR-008); a missing entry in that YAML raises ConstitutionalError at startup. executor is a Python Callable (runtime-only, not JSON-serializable); it is included in properties to suppress false-positive undeclared-field findings from the AST gate. Governed vocabulary: action_category enum in .intent/META/enums.json (ADR-056 D5). Version 1.1.0: artifact_type added per ADR-091 D6 item 3 / ADR-092 D1 — the F-41 registry-coupling field carried on every action declaration. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.

action_id.description: Registered AtomicAction identifier. Primary key in ActionRegistry.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does.

category.description: Constitutional action category. Governed vocabulary: action_category enum in .intent/META/enums.json. Values: fix, sync, check, build, state.

policies.description: Constitutional policy IDs this action enforces or depends on.

executor.description: Callable[..., Awaitable[ActionResult]] — the async handler for this action. Runtime-only field; not JSON-serializable. Included in properties to suppress AST gate false positives.

impact_level.description: Impact classification (str, default ''). Overlaid at ActionExecutor init from .intent/enforcement/config/action_risk.yaml (ADR-008). Governed vocabulary: action_impact enum in .intent/META/enums.json. A missing action_id in action_risk.yaml raises ConstitutionalError at startup.

requires_db.description: Whether this action requires database access. Default False.

requires_vectors.description: Whether this action requires vector store access. Default False.

remediates.description: Rule IDs this action is capable of remediating. Used by RemediatorWorker for remediation map lookup. Default empty list.

artifact_type.description: F-41 artifact_type IDs this action mutates (ADR-091 D6 item 3, ADR-092 D1). Default empty tuple. Overlaid at ActionExecutor init from .intent/taxonomies/operational_capabilities.yaml via ActionRegistry.apply_artifact_type_config(). Empty tuple means the action does not engage the F-43 registry-coupling chokepoint (the ~13 infrastructure capabilities legitimately have no artifact target per ADR-092 sub-question (i)).
